task.objective: Create a new API endpoint `/api/executions/search` that performs server-side search across test executions by branch name, commit SHA, or suite name. This enables the compare page to find executions beyond the initial 50 loaded on page.

context.project_type: E2E Test Dashboard - Compare Page Enhancement
context.background:
The current compare page loads only 50 executions on page load and performs client-side search filtering. This means users cannot find executions that aren't in the initial 50 results. For example, if a user wants to compare against a commit from 2 weeks ago, they cannot find it through the current search.
The existing `/api/executions/route.ts` supports filtering by branch, suite, status, and date range, but doesn't support free-text search across multiple fields.
The existing `/api/search/route.ts` searches TEST names, not executions.
EXISTING PATTERN: The codebase uses `sql.unsafe()` for dynamic SQL with string-built WHERE clauses. User input must be sanitized by escaping single quotes.
context.audience: - Dashboard users comparing test runs - Developers investigating regressions across commits
context.impact: HIGH - Enables finding any execution in the database through search, removing the current limitation of only accessing the most recent 50 executions.

file.description: Existing pattern: getExecutions uses sql.unsafe for dynamic WHERE
Existing pattern: searchTests uses parameterized ILIKE
getQueriesForOrg pattern for adding new functions

existing_code.file: getExecutions: (limit?: number, offset?: number, status?: string, branch?: string, dateRange?: DateRangeFilter, suite?: string) => getExecutions(organizationId, limit, offset, status, branch, dateRange, suite), ... getExecutionsGroupedByBranch: (dateRange?: DateRangeFilter, maxRunsPerSuite?: number) => getExecutionsGroupedByBranch(organizationId, dateRange, maxRunsPerSuite),

export interface TestExecution { id: number run_id: string branch: string commit_sha: string commit_message: string | null triggered_by: string workflow_name: string suite: string | null status: "success" | "failure" | "running" total_tests: number passed: number failed: number skipped: number duration_ms: number | null started_at: string completed_at: string | null created_at: string }

functional.requirement: Search across branch name, commit_sha, and suite fields
Support `q` query parameter for search term (minimum 2 chars)
Sanitize user input to prevent SQL injection (escape single quotes)
Return executions sorted by started_at DESC (most recent first)
Use ILIKE for case-insensitive partial matching
Support optional `branch` filter to scope search within a branch
Support optional `suite` filter to scope search within a suite

non_functional.requirement: Follow existing codebase patterns (sql.unsafe for dynamic WHERE)
Return quickly (search should complete in <200ms for most queries)
Handle edge cases (empty query, special characters, null values)

solution.approach: 1. Create a new `searchExecutions()` function in `lib/db.ts` following the existing pattern 2. Use ILIKE for case-insensitive search across branch, commit_sha, and suite 3. Sanitize user input by escaping single quotes (matching existing pattern in codebase) 4. Create a new API route at `app/api/executions/search/route.ts` 5. Add the function to the `getQueriesForOrg` export

new_file.description: New API endpoint for execution search

test.description: Test search API endpoint with branch name
test.expected_response: - Status 200 - Response includes `executions` array with matching results - Each execution has branch containing "main" - Results sorted by started_at DESC - Response includes `total` count
- Returns same results as search for "main" (ILIKE is case-insensitive)
- Status 200 - Returns empty executions array - Includes message about minimum 2 characters
- Status 200 (no SQL error) - Returns empty array or matching results (single quote is escaped) - No database error
- Returns only executions on "main" branch matching "referral"

edge_cases.case: Returns empty array immediately without database call
Returns empty array with message, not a database query
Single quotes are escaped: ' becomes '' Other special characters are safe with ILIKE pattern matching
Still works but may return fewer results; no truncation needed
COALESCE(suite, '') ensures null suites don't cause issues
Capped at 50 to prevent excessive results

always.rule: Validate query length before executing database query
Sanitize user input by escaping single quotes
Return consistent response shape (executions array, even if empty)
Follow existing codebase patterns for SQL construction

never.rule: Never expose executions from other organizations
Never execute search with empty or 1-character query
Never trust user input without sanitization

output_format.structure: 1. Add `searchExecutions` function to `lib/db.ts` (after `getExecutions`, around line 100) 2. Add export to `getQueriesForOrg` object (around line 2690) 3. Create `app/api/executions/search/route.ts` (new file)
output_format.validation: After implementation: 1. Run `npx tsc --noEmit` to verify TypeScript compiles 2. Run `npm run lint` to verify no lint errors 3. Run `npm run dev` and test the API endpoints with curl commands above 4. Specifically test SQL injection case to verify sanitization works
